news_items.headline: Shortstop prospect Pratt, 21, called up by Brewers...
news_items.summary: Cooper Pratt has reached the majors 2½ months after the Brewers signed the prospect to an eight-year, $50.75 million contract, as Milwaukee promoted the 21-year-old shortstop from Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday before a three-game series with Cleveland.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Crow-Armstrong hits for first cycle of 2026
news_items.summary: Cubs center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong became the first player in the majors to hit for the cycle this season.

news_items.headline: MLB cautions against writing on Pride Night hats
news_items.summary: Major League Baseball on Monday decried the use of personal writings on any team-issued Pride Night hats after members of the San Francisco Giants had Bible verses etched into their caps during Friday's loss to the Chicago Cubs.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Keith slugs 3 HRs, upping '26 total to 4
news_items.summary: Colt Keith hit three home runs and had six RBIs as the Detroit Tigers took down the Houston Astros 9-3 on Monday night.

news_items.headline: Strider sees specialist, shut down for 4 weeks
news_items.summary: The Braves have shut down Spencer Strider for four weeks due to elbow inflammation, but Atlanta did get some good news with the return of catcher Drake Baldwin.

news_items.headline: 'Energetic' Raleigh set to return to M's Tuesday
news_items.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh, on the injured list since May 14 with a right oblique strain, is set to return to the lineup on Tuesday against the Baltimore Orioles, and seems ready to improve on his .161 batting average through 41 games this year.
